description: An employee submits their two-week notice of resignation.

nodes.task_description: Receive the resignation letter and acknowledge it in writing.

expected_outcome.value: HR specialist receives the resignation and sends a confirmation email.

nodes.task_description: Enter the termination date into the HRIS to trigger the offboarding workflow.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist correctly enters the employee's last day in the system.

nodes.task_description: Prepare the final paycheck and benefits paperwork for the employee's last day.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist calculates and prepares all final separation documents and pay.
